response: The Revenue team has proposed a new $29/month "Starter" pricing tier—positioned between the Free tier and $79/month Pro tier, with included benefits of 5 users, 10K API calls, and email support—based on analysis showing 40% of churned users cited price as their reason for leaving. This proposed Starter tier is projected to recover 15% of price-related churned users and generate $180K in annual recurring revenue, so relevant stakeholders should review and act on the pricing tier proposal.
